overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunny waterfront city street in Night City. The character passes futuristic storefronts, walks under a yellow pedestrian overpass, and continues along a palm-lined promenade with towering skyscrapers and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and vehicle traffic

events.description: approaching and entering the shadow cast by the yellow pedestrian overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past the One Bill storefront, approaching the yellow pedestrian overpass

notable_agents.action: turquoise car driving along the multi-lane street
person with red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: commercial storefront with red and green neon signage reading ONE BILL
elevated yellow pedestrian bridge crossing over the street ahead
tall modern building with large digital billboards and glass facade
parked turquoise vehicle on the street side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny commercial sidewalk with the One Bill store on the right and moderate traffic on the left. The yellow pedestrian overpass looms ahead as the character approaches the shadowed area beneath it.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under pedestrian overpass with food vendors

events.description: exiting the overpass shadow back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking under the shadowed pedestrian overpass, passing red food vendor stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: person with red mohawk and white shirt walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete support columns for the overpass structure
red-colored food vendor kiosks lined up under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the shadowed area beneath the yellow overpass, passing concrete support pillars and red food vendor stalls. The lighting shifts to diffused shadows before emerging back into sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with bay views

events.description: transitioning from covered commercial street to open waterfront promenade with palm trees
passing a bus stop shelter and approaching the plaza area with construction cranes visible across the bay

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunny waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the right side and the bay visible beyond the railing

notable_agents.action: person in orange shirt and dark pants walking ahead along the waterfront path

entered.detail: black metal railing separating the sidewalk from the water
body of water with distant city skyline and construction cranes
glass and metal bus stop structure with bench, appearing mid-segment

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass, the scene opens into a bright waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the path and the city bay visible to the right. The character passes food stalls and continues along the railing with futuristic skyscrapers on the left and construction cranes visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront plaza with orange arch structure

events.description: approaching the distinctive orange arch structure marking the plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the plaza area with an orange arch structure, continuing along the waterfront with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the plaza entrance ahead

entered.detail: large distinctive orange architectural arch structure marking the plaza entrance
wooden canopy structure with curved roof in the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a bustling waterfront plaza marked by a distinctive orange arch structure. The path continues along the bay with more pedestrians visible ahead, and the plaza canopy becomes prominent in the distance as the character moves toward the open public space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny city sidewalk that passes through a shadowed underpass before opening onto a bright waterfront promenade. It begins with the character walking past the One Bill store and moderate traffic, moving steadily toward the looming structure of a yellow pedestrian overpass. As the character enters the shadowed area beneath the bridge, the lighting shifts to diffused tones while passing concrete support pillars and red food vendor stalls. The scene then expands back into brilliant sunlight as the character emerges from the overpass, revealing a palm-lined path beside the city bay. Finally, the camera continues along the railing past further food stalls, with futuristic skyscrapers on the left and distant construction cranes visible across the water.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a city street toward a wide, bustling waterfront plaza. It begins as the character approaches the bay, moving past the initial urban structures toward a distinctive orange arch. As the character advances, the path opens up to reveal more pedestrians scattered across the public space. The scene then expands to highlight the prominent plaza canopy in the distance before finally merging into the open atmosphere of the waterfront.
